text.title: Agency Kickoff Deck Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping artefact state to a rule.

branch.when: slides_over == false AND asks_missing == false AND owner_tbd == true
slides_over == false AND asks_missing == false AND owner_tbd == false AND risks_count != 5
slides_over == false AND asks_missing == false AND owner_tbd == false AND risks_count == 5 AND comms_missing == true

conclusion.verdict: add comms cadence slide before kickoff

branch.when: slides_over == false AND asks_missing == false AND owner_tbd == false AND risks_count == 5 AND comms_missing == false

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: slides_over=false, asks_missing=false, owner_tbd=false, risks_count==5, comms_missing=false → accept deck.
